title: Granite Headphone — Ochre
summary: Granite headphone in ochre; built in Spain for daily use.

content.text:
# Granite Headphone — Ochre

Built for daily wear and refinishing. The Granite Headphone — Ochre is designed for the long haul, with audio-grade materials and a quiet, considered fit and finish.

## Highlights

- Crafted in Spain.
- Repairable construction with serviceable parts.
- Backed by a one-year materials warranty.

## Care

Condition every 60 days for best results. Spot-clean only; avoid harsh detergents. Store in a cool, dry place out of direct sunlight.
